description: MONTEBELLO – Rarely available large townhome offered at an unbeatable price, featuring a REC Room & double side-by-side garage plus extra parking. The main floor offers soaring ceilings and a gourmet kitchen with granite countertops and stainless steel appliances. Enjoy a well-designed layout with a spacious living room, dining area, family room, and eating area, plus a generous deck off the kitchen—perfect for entertaining. The upper level includes three well-sized bedrooms, including a primary bedroom with walk-in closet and ensuite featuring double sinks. The lower level boasts a large media room or recreation room, with mirrored wall—perfect for a home gym or studio.  A fantastic opportunity in a sought-after community.Kept Like a GEM !
